src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/Earthq.general_idea: Removed the RestTemplate bean definition as it is no longer needed in the application.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/Earthq.human_impl: Deleted the @Bean method returning new RestTemplate()

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/Earthq.general_idea: Changed bean methods from public to package-private visibility to restrict access scope.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/Earthq.human_impl: Removed 'public' modifier from facesServletRegistration, servletContextInitializer, and jsfConfigureListener methods

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/Earthq.general_idea: Reordered import statements to follow a specific coding style or tool configuration.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/Earthq.human_impl: Moved ConfigureListener import to top and removed RestTemplate import

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/Earthq.general_idea: Adjusted code formatting for method chaining and line breaks.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/Earthq.human_impl: Reformatted setInitParameter call to use line continuation

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/bean/E.general_idea: Replace legacy java.text.SimpleDateFormat with java.time.DateTimeFormatter for thread-safe date formatting.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/bean/E.human_impl: import java.time.LocalDateTime; import java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter; private static final DateTimeFormatter FORMATTER = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm:ss");

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/bean/E.general_idea: Rename method from Spanish 'consultarSismos' to English 'searchEarthquakes' for consistency.
Convert synchronous service call to reactive subscribe pattern.
Update date formatting logic to use the new DateTimeFormatter and LocalDateTime API.

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/domain.general_idea: Convert instance field to private static final constant to improve immutability and thread safety.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/domain.human_impl: Changed 'DecimalFormat df' to 'private static final DecimalFormat DF'

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/domain.general_idea: Update reference to use the newly declared static constant.
Remove trailing empty line at the end of the file.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/domain.human_impl: Removed blank line before closing brace

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/domain.general_idea: Replace separate @Getter and @Setter annotations with the combined @Data annotation to reduce boilerplate.

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/servic.general_idea: Converted the concrete service class into an interface to define the contract without implementation details.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/servic.human_impl: Changed `public class EarthquakeService` to `public interface EarthquakeService` and removed all fields and methods.

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/servic.general_idea: Removed imports related to synchronous HTTP client (RestTemplate) and logging as they are no longer used in the interface.
Removed imports for legacy date/time handling classes that were part of the removed implementation.
Added import for Reactor's Mono type to support reactive return types in the new interface.
Changed the earthquake count query method to return a reactive Mono instead of a direct object.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/servic.human_impl: Changed return type of `earthquakeCountQuery` from `EarthquakeCount` to `Mono<EarthquakeCount>`.

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/servic.general_idea: Removed the entire implementation logic including URL constants, RestTemplate usage, and date formatting helpers.

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/util/E.general_idea: Reorder import statements to group standard library, project, and third-party imports separately.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/util/E.human_impl: Moved java.util imports to top, followed by com.gsdd, then lombok, then org.primefaces.

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/util/E.general_idea: Remove unnecessary trailing blank line at the end of the file.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/util/E.human_impl: Deleted the empty line before the closing brace of the class.
